reviews.comment:
En Años de ser Socio del ACA es la primera vez que encuentro los Baños tan Sucio y Mal Oliente , El área de descanso Basura por todos lados,  Me llena de Tristeza ver el parador de Años en tanta Decadencia !!

(Translated by Google)
In all my years as an ACA member, this is the first time I've found the restrooms so dirty and smelly. The rest area is littered with trash. It fills me with sadness to see this long-established rest stop in such a state of disrepair!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROa1A2LTB3RRAB
